summary: The diff implements all four requirements: REQ-1 (Other Vehicle section), REQ-2 (multiple witnesses), REQ-3 (video uploader), and REQ-4 (injury photo uploader moved to top). Backend types and migration are updated, frontend form and detail view are updated, and query hooks are extended. One minor gap: REQ-1 requires an 'address' field for the other vehicle driver contact, which is present in the frontend OtherVehicleForm interface but the backend OtherVehicle type in main.mo does not include an 'address' field.

missing_requirements.requirement: Driver contact fields include address for the other vehicle section, persisted to backend
missing_requirements.reason: The frontend OtherVehicleForm interface includes an 'address' field, but the backend OtherVehicle type in main.mo does not include an 'address' field (only ownerName, email, phone, insurer, etc.), so address data cannot be fully persisted to the backend as required.
